title: Rajgad Fort
tagline: Rajgad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Rajgad (literal meaning ruling fort) is a Hill region fort situated in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Rajgad (literal meaning ruling fort) is a Hill region fort situated in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India. Formerly known as Murumbdev, the fort was the first capital of the Maratha Empire under the rule of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj for almost 26 years, after which the capital was moved to the Raigad Fort. Treasures discovered from an adjacent fort called Torna were used to completely build and fortify the Rajgad Fort. The Rajgad Fort is located around 60 km (37 mi) to the south-west of Pune and about 15 km (9.3 mi) west of Nasrapur in the Sahyadris range.

topPlaces.name: Torna Fort
topPlaces.description: Torna Fort, also known as Prachandagad, is a large fort located in Pune district, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is historically significant because it was the first fort captured by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in 1646, at the age of 16.

topPlaces.name: Gunjwani Dam
topPlaces.description: Gunjwane Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Kanandi river near Velhe, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Torna Fort, also known as Prachandagad, is a large fort located in Pune district, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is historically significant because it was the first fort captured by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in 1646, at the age of 16.
Gunjwane Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Kanandi river near Velhe, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajgad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajgad Fort is Apr – Jun, Sep – Oct. Summers are 10–22°C and winters are -6–10°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajgad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajgad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajgad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajgad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rajgad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajgad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Torna Fort, Gunjwani Dam.
